_comment: PlanAmendmentRequest with ambiguity trigger and three recommended paths exercising the multi-path shape.
proposed_delta: Plan section 4.2 says 'retry up to 3 times'; ambiguous whether this counts attempts or retries.
rationale: Two reasonable readings yield 3 vs 4 wall-clock attempts; clarify before next ramp.

recommended_paths.tradeoff: More tolerant; higher cost on terminal failure.

recommended_paths.summary: Make the count parametric; future plans state attempts vs retries explicitly.
recommended_paths.tradeoff: Doesn't resolve this run; resolves the whole class.

jury_recommendation: Path-C; lock the parameterization rule for future plans.
